name: Appwrite
description: Read-only access to Appwrite database documents using the server-side REST API. Each tool requires your Appwrite Project ID as a header parameter. After creating this project, set the API key under Authentication. For self-hosted Appwrite, update the base URL in Settings.

auth.hint: Create a Server API Key in the Appwrite Console → Project Settings → API Keys. Grant at least the "databases.read" scope.

tools.name: list_documents
tools.description: List documents from an Appwrite collection. Requires the Appwrite Project ID as a header. Supports pagination via limit and offset.

params.name: x-appwrite-project
params.description: Your Appwrite Project ID, found in Project Settings → Project ID

params.name: databaseId
params.description: Database ID, found in Databases → select database → Settings

params.name: collectionId
params.description: Collection ID, found in Databases → collection → Settings

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of documents to skip for pagination

tools.name: get_document
tools.description: Get a single document from an Appwrite collection by its document ID.

params.name: x-appwrite-project
params.description: Your Appwrite Project ID, found in Project Settings → Project ID
